content.p: When any Member or Delegate withdraws from his seat and does not return before the adjournment of Congress, he shall, in addition to the sum deducted for each day, forfeit a sum equal to the amount which would have been allowed by law for his mileage in returning home; and such sum shall be deducted from his compensation, unless the withdrawal is with the leave of the Senate or House of Representatives respectively.

note.heading: Codification
note.p: Section was formerly classified to section 40 of this title prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.
R.S. § 41 derived from Res. July 17, 1862, No. 68, § 2, 12 Stat. 628.
